mapper.sql: id, app_id, permission_id, status, channel_type, channel_address, auth_type, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by, approved_at, approved_by
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_subscription_t SET status = #{status}, channel_type = #{channelType}, channel_address = #{channelAddress}, auth_type = #{authType}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE openplatform_v2_subscription_t SET channel_type = #{channelType}, channel_address = #{channelAddress}, auth_type = #{authType}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
